name: 人体
subject: science
curriculum_points: Bh.01 Identify, name, draw and label the basic parts of the human body.
Bh.02 Know the importance of exercise, eating the right amounts of different types of food, and hygiene for humans.
Bh.03 Identify that animals, including humans, need the right types and amount of nutrition, and that they cannot make their own food; they get nutrition from what they eat.
Bh.04 Identify that humans and some other animals have skeletons and muscles for support, protection and movement.
Bh.05 Describe the ways in which nutrients and water are transported within animals, including humans.
Bh.06 Describe the changes as humans develop to old age.
